untranslatable_reason: Broadening Bottom pattern requires detection of diverging trend lines across minor highs and lows (pattern recognition at multiple swing points). The allowed indicator set contains only price, moving averages, and oscillators—no trend line slope detection, swing point identification, or divergence measurement capabilities. Pattern geometry (megaphone formation with opposite slope directions) cannot be expressed with the available operators (>, <, >=, <=, ==, crosses_above, crosses_below, is). This requires custom pattern recognition logic beyond the scope of simple indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Signal describes a technical chart pattern requiring multi-level trend line analysis. Provided entry/exit conditions are placeholder breakout logic only and do NOT capture the actual Broadening Bottom pattern detection requirements. Recommend implementing as a custom pattern detector outside the rules engine.
